name: Tenant group governance and admin entry

dataIsolation.guard: Each query, schema update and row PATCH is tenant-keyed; group-binding rows must belong to the tenant's declared data source under its Notion parent page.

definitionOfDone: Tenant has the groups module enabled
Its own group-binding data source contains all v2 fields
The backend can read and save only that tenant's group rows
A saved group change invalidates that group route cache
